brand.taglineShort: Your chair is probably wrong for you.

homepage.h1: Your chair is wrong for you. Here's how to fix it.
homepage.subhead: Real-world reviews of ergonomic chairs, standing desks, monitor arms, split keyboards, and the small adjustments that stop the neck pain that started in 2020 and never went away. Tested across 8 body types, 3 working styles, 60-day minimum.
homepage.trustLine: We buy every product at retail. Test for 60 days minimum. Say skip it when we mean it. No manufacturer samples.

about.headline: Why ChairWise exists
about.body: Home-office ergonomics went from an HR topic to a household crisis in 2020, and nobody is coming to fix it. We test the chairs, desks, arms, and keyboards that matter, rate them for specific bodies and specific work — not average users and not influencer gift bags — and tell you where the real price-quality cliffs are.
